differential_diagnoses: Ischemic cardiomyopathy with occult coronary artery disease (e.g., microvascular)
next_steps: Serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi antibodies
Cardiac PET scan to evaluate for active sarcoidosis inflammation
Review of ECG for specific conduction system disease (e.g., RBBB, bifascicular block)
Genetic counseling and mutation panel testing for dilated cardiomyopathy
Echocardiographic monitoring for interval change in apical thrombus or flow dynamics
Referral for ICD implantation for primary prevention of sudden cardiac death
Assessment for GI tract involvement (e.g., dysphagia/constipation) related to Chagas disease
